---
title: "free_study_cloud"
output:
  html_document: default
---

```{r}
##LOADING PACKAGES
library(tidyverse)
#library(gtools)
#library(plyr)
#library(magrittr)
library(dplyr)
#library(lme4)
library(ggplot2)
#library(tidyr)
#library(stringr)
```

```{r}
#LOADING IN DATA
multmerge = function(mypath){
  filenames=list.files(path=mypath, full.names=TRUE)
  datalist = lapply(filenames, function(x){read.csv(file=x,header=T)})
  Reduce(function(x,y) {merge(x,y,all = TRUE)}, datalist)
}
full_data = multmerge("/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLA_stuff_2024/All_Data/all_free_study_data/FS_1y/Data/FTnewOAoa-Data/Output")

free_data_y_f <- full_data
write.csv(free_data_y_f, file= "free_data_y_fs.csv")
```

```{r}
#LOADING IN DATA
multmerge = function(mypath){
  filenames=list.files(path=mypath, full.names=TRUE)
  datalist = lapply(filenames, function(x){read.csv(file=x,header=T)})
  Reduce(function(x,y) {merge(x,y,all = TRUE)}, datalist)
}
full_data = multmerge("/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLA_stuff_2024/All_Data/all_free_study_data/FS_2y/Data/FTnewOAoa-Data/Output")

free_data_y_nf <- full_data
write.csv(free_data_y_nf, file= "free_data_y_nfs.csv")
```

```{r}
#LOADING IN DATA
multmerge = function(mypath){
  filenames=list.files(path=mypath, full.names=TRUE)
  datalist = lapply(filenames, function(x){read.csv(file=x,header=T)})
  Reduce(function(x,y) {merge(x,y,all = TRUE)}, datalist)
}
full_data = multmerge("/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLA_stuff_2024/All_Data/all_free_study_data/FS_1o/Data/FTnewOAoa-Data/Output")

free_data_o_f <- full_data
write.csv(free_data_o_f, file= "free_data_o_fs.csv")
```

```{r}

#LOADING IN DATA
multmerge = function(mypath){
  filenames=list.files(path=mypath, full.names=TRUE)
  datalist = lapply(filenames, function(x){read.csv(file=x,header=T)})
  Reduce(function(x,y) {merge(x,y,all = TRUE)}, datalist)
}
full_data = multmerge("/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLA_stuff_2024/All_Data/all_free_study_data/FS_2o/Data/FTnewOAoa-Data/Output")

free_data_o_nf <- full_data
write.csv(free_data_o_nf, file= "free_data_o_nfs.csv")
```

```{r}
FS_1y <- read.csv("/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLA_stuff_2024/All_Data/all_free_study_data/FS_1y/Data/FTnewOAoa-Data/DemographicsData.csv")
FS_2y <- read.csv("/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLA_stuff_2024/All_Data/all_free_study_data/FS_2y/Data/FTnewOAoa-Data/DemographicsData.csv")
FS_1o <- read.csv("/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLA_stuff_2024/All_Data/all_free_study_data/FS_1o/Data/FTnewOAoa-Data/DemographicsData.csv")
FS_2o <- read.csv("/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLA_stuff_2024/All_Data/all_free_study_data/FS_2o/Data/FTnewOAoa-Data/DemographicsData.csv")

FS_1y$agegroup <- 'Young'
FS_2y$agegroup <- 'Young'
FS_1o$agegroup <- 'Older'
FS_2o$agegroup <- 'Older'

FS_1y$study <- 'free'
FS_2y$study <- 'no free'
FS_1o$study <- 'free'
FS_2o$study <- 'no free'

FS_1y <- subset(FS_1y, FS_1y$Username!= "testWorker")
FS_2y <- subset(FS_2y, FS_2y$Username!= "testWorker")
FS_1o <- subset(FS_1o, FS_1o$Username!= "testWorker")
FS_2o <- subset(FS_2o, FS_2o$Username!= "testWorker")

FS_demo_young <- rbind(FS_1y, FS_2y)
FS_demo_old <- rbind(FS_1o, FS_2o)

mean(FS_demo_young$Age) 
sd(FS_demo_young$Age)

range(FS_demo_young$Age)



mean(FS_demo_old$Age) 
sd(FS_demo_old$Age)

range(FS_demo_old$Age)

#counts <- ddply(FS_demo_young, .(FS_demo_young$ID, FS_demo_young$study), nrow)

#names(counts) <- c("ID", "study", "Freq")
#data.frame(table(counts$study))

#counts_o <- ddply(FS_demo_old, .(FS_demo_old$ID, FS_demo_old$study), nrow)
#names(counts_o) <- c("ID", "study", "Freq")
#data.frame(table(counts_o$study))
```



```{r}
free_data_y_f$agegroup <- 'Young'
free_data_y_nf$agegroup <- 'Young'
free_data_o_f$agegroup <- 'Older'
free_data_o_nf$agegroup <- 'Older'

free_data_all <- rbind(free_data_y_f, free_data_y_nf)

free_data_all <- rbind(free_data_all, free_data_o_f)

free_data_all_ <- rbind(free_data_all, free_data_o_nf)

free_data_all<- free_data_all_ %>%
  select(ID, Order.File, Procedure.Text, Response.RT, Response.Response, agegroup)


free_data_all <- mutate(free_data_all, 
                    Question = ifelse(str_detect(free_data_all$Procedure.Text, "many"), "occurance","Other"))

free_data_all_howmany <- free_data_all %>% subset(Question == "occurance")
free_data_all_howmany <- free_data_all_howmany %>% distinct()

write.csv(free_data_all_howmany, file= "free_data_all_cloud_howmany.csv")

free_data_all_hm_revised <- read.csv("/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLAstuff/Free Study/free_data_all_cloud_howmany.csv")

free_data_all_info <- mutate(free_data_all, 
                    Question = ifelse(str_detect(free_data_all$Procedure.Text, "type"), "info","Other"))

free_data_all_info <- free_data_all_info %>% subset(Question == "info")
free_data_all_info <- free_data_all_info %>% distinct()

write.csv(free_data_all_info, file= "free_data_all_cloud_info.csv")

free_data_all_info_revised <- read.csv("/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLAstuff/Free Study/free_data_all_cloud_info.csv")

free_data_all <- mutate(free_data_all, 
                    Question = ifelse(str_detect(free_data_all$Procedure.Text, "many"), "occurance","Other"))

free_data_all_howmany <- free_data_all %>% subset(Question == "occurance")
free_data_all_howmany <- free_data_all_howmany %>% distinct()

free_data_all_incline <- mutate(free_data_all, 
                    Question = ifelse(str_detect(free_data_all$Procedure.Text, "inclined"), "occurance","Other"))

free_data_all_incline <- free_data_all_incline %>% subset(Question == "occurance")
free_data_all_incline <- free_data_all_incline %>% distinct()

write.csv(free_data_all_incline, file= "free_data_all_cloud_incline.csv")

free_data_all_incline_revised <- read.csv("/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLAstuff/Free Study/free_data_all_cloud_incline.csv")


```

```{r}
matching_ids <- FS_demo_old$ID %in% free_data_all_hm_revised$ID

# Subset FS_demo_old to keep only the rows with matching IDs
FS_demo_old_filtered <- FS_demo_old[matching_ids, ]

mean(FS_demo_old_filtered$Age) 
sd(FS_demo_old_filtered$Age)

range(FS_demo_old_filtered$Age)

#counts <- ddply(FS_demo_old_filtered, .(FS_demo_old_filtered$ID, FS_demo_old_filtered$study, FS_demo_old_filtered$Gender), nrow)

#names(counts) <- c("ID", "study", "Gender","Freq")
#data.frame(table(counts$study))
#data.frame(table(counts$Gender))
```
```{r}
matching_ids_y <- FS_demo_young$ID %in% free_data_all_hm_revised$ID

# Subset FS_demo_old to keep only the rows with matching IDs
FS_demo_young_filtered <- FS_demo_young[matching_ids_y, ]

mean(FS_demo_young_filtered$Age) 
sd(FS_demo_young_filtered$Age)

range(FS_demo_young_filtered$Age)

#counts <- ddply(FS_demo_young_filtered, .(FS_demo_young_filtered$ID, FS_demo_young_filtered$study, FS_demo_young_filtered$Gender), nrow)

#names(counts) <- c("ID", "study", "Gender", "Freq")
#data.frame(table(counts$study))
#data.frame(table(counts$Gender))
```

```{r}
#how many graph
stand_figure_howmany_all <- data.frame(
  Study=c("Free", "No Free", "Free", "No Free"),
  Age = c("Young", "Young", "Older", "Older"),
  sd=c(.297, .320, .284, .356)
)

#free_data_all_hm_revised <- na.omit(free_data_all_hm_revised)

figure_free_hm <- free_data_all_hm_revised %>% 
  select(Order.File, Response.Response, agegroup) %>% as.data.frame()

figure_free_hm <- na.omit(figure_free_hm)

#as.numeric(figure_free$Response.Response)

average_howmany_all <- figure_free_hm %>% 
  group_by(Order.File, agegroup) %>% summarise_at(vars(Response.Response), list(Response.Response = mean))

colnames(average_howmany_all)[colnames(average_howmany_all) == 'Order.File'] <- 'Study'
colnames(average_howmany_all)[colnames(average_howmany_all) == 'agegroup'] <- 'Age'
average_howmany_all[average_howmany_all == "procedure_free.csv" ] <- "Free"
average_howmany_all[average_howmany_all == "procedure.csv"] <- "No Free"

#average_$Time <- factor(average_honesty_o$Time, levels = c("Pre", "Post"))

average_figure_all_hm<- merge(average_howmany_all, stand_figure_howmany_all, by=c("Study","Age"))

average_figure_all_hm_fig <- ggplot(data=average_figure_all_hm, aes(x=Study, y=Response.Response, fill=Age)) +
geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge(), col = "black")+
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE)) +
  labs(x = "Study", y = "Number of times 'free' was recalled", 
       title= "Recalling 'free'") +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'),legend.direction = "horizontal",legend.position = c(0.6, 0.8))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("black", "white"),name="")+ 
#theme_minimal() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Response.Response-sd, ymax=Response.Response+sd), width=0.2, colour="gray27", position=position_dodge(.9)) +
  ylim(0,6)+
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(3, 0), linetype = "dashed", color = c("pink", "lightblue"))

average_figure_all_hm_fig
```

```{r}

average_figure_all_hm$Age <- factor(average_figure_all_hm$Age, levels = c("Young", "Older"))
average_figure_all_hm_fig_col <- ggplot(data=average_figure_all_hm, aes(x=Age, y=Response.Response, fill=Study)) +
geom_bar(stat="identity", color= "black", position=position_dodge())+
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = FALSE)) +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Number of times 'free' was recalled") +
scale_fill_manual(values=c("gray70",
                             "black"))+
theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'), axis.line.x = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.line.y = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.ticks.x=element_blank())+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Response.Response-sd, ymax=Response.Response+sd), width=0.2, colour="gray27", position=position_dodge(.9)) +
  ylim(0,6)

average_figure_all_hm_fig_col
```

```{r}
colnames(free_data_all_incline_revised)[colnames(free_data_all_incline_revised) == 'Order.File'] <- 'Study'
colnames(free_data_all_incline_revised)[colnames(free_data_all_incline_revised) == 'inclined'] <- 'Type'
free_data_all_incline_revised[free_data_all_incline_revised == "procedure_free.csv" ] <- "Free"
free_data_all_incline_revised[free_data_all_incline_revised == "procedure.csv"] <- "No Free"
colnames(free_data_all_incline_revised)[colnames(free_data_all_incline_revised) == 'incline'] <- 'Incline'
colnames(free_data_all_incline_revised)[colnames(free_data_all_incline_revised) == 'agegroup'] <- 'Age'

figure_free_hm <- free_data_all_hm_revised %>% 
  select(ID, Order.File, Response.Response, agegroup) %>% as.data.frame()

figure_free_incline <- free_data_all_incline_revised %>% 
  select(ID, Study, Incline, Age) %>% as.data.frame()


average_figure_all_incline<- merge(figure_free_hm, figure_free_incline, by=c("ID"))


free_data_all_incline_revised <- subset(average_figure_all_incline, average_figure_all_incline$Study!= "No Free")

free_data_all_incline_revised <- na.omit(free_data_all_incline_revised)

write.csv(free_data_all_incline_revised, "free_data_all_incline_revised.csv")

average_free_all_incline_revised_free <- free_data_all_incline_revised %>% 
  group_by(Incline, Age) %>% summarise_at(vars(Response.Response), list(Response.Response = mean))

stand_incline_free <- data.frame(
  Incline=c("Not Inclined", "Unsure", "Inclined", "Not Inclined", "Unsure", "Inclined"),
  Age = c("Young", "Young", "Young", "Older", "Older", "Older"),
  sd=c(.391, .68, .681, .339, .27, 1.4)

)
average_free_all_incline_revised_free$Incline<-as.character(average_free_all_incline_revised_free$Incline)
average_free_all_incline_revised_free[average_free_all_incline_revised_free == "0" ] <- "Not Inclined"
average_free_all_incline_revised_free[average_free_all_incline_revised_free == "1" ] <- "Unsure"
average_free_all_incline_revised_free[average_free_all_incline_revised_free == "2" ] <- "Inclined"
average_free_all_incline_revised_free[average_free_all_incline_revised_free == "3" ] <- "Very Inclined"

write.csv(average_free_all_incline_revised_free, "average_free_all_incline_revised_free.csv")

average_free_all_incline_revised_free <- read.csv("/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLAstuff/Free Study/average_free_all_incline_revised_free.csv")

average_figure_all_incline_free<- merge(average_free_all_incline_revised_free, stand_incline_free, by=c("Incline","Age"))

average_figure_all_incline_free$Age <- factor(average_figure_all_incline_free$Age, levels = c("Young", "Older"))

average_figure_all_incline_free$Incline <- factor(average_figure_all_incline_free$Incline, levels = c("Not Inclined", "Unsure", "Inclined"))

ggplot(data=average_figure_all_incline_free, aes(x=Age, y=Response.Response, fill=Incline)) +
geom_bar(stat="identity", color= "black", position=position_dodge())+
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = FALSE)) +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Number of times 'free' was recalled", 
       title= "Recalling 'free' in Free Condition") +
scale_fill_manual(values=c("pink",
                             "lightblue", "#CBC3E3"))+
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Response.Response-sd, ymax=Response.Response+sd), width=0.2, colour="black", position=position_dodge(.9)) +
  ylim(0,6)+
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(3), linetype = "dashed", color = c("black"))

free_data_all_incline_revised$Incline<-as.character(free_data_all_incline_revised$Incline)
free_data_all_incline_revised$Incline[free_data_all_incline_revised$Incline == "0" ] <- "Not Inclined"
free_data_all_incline_revised$Incline[free_data_all_incline_revised$Incline == "1" ] <- "Unsure"
free_data_all_incline_revised$Incline[free_data_all_incline_revised$Incline == "2" ] <- "Inclined"
#free_data_all_incline_revised[free_data_all_incline_revised == "3" ] <- "Very Inclined"


free_data_all_incline_revised_o <- subset(free_data_all_incline_revised, free_data_all_incline_revised$Age!= "Young") %>% drop_na()

free_data_all_incline_revised_y <- subset(free_data_all_incline_revised, free_data_all_incline_revised$Age!= "Older") %>% drop_na()

free_data_all_incline_revised_o$Incline <- factor(free_data_all_incline_revised_o$Incline, levels = c("Not Inclined", "Unsure", "Inclined"))

free_data_all_incline_revised_y$Incline <- factor(free_data_all_incline_revised_y$Incline, levels = c("Not Inclined", "Unsure", "Inclined"))

free_data_all_incline_revised_o <- free_data_all_incline_revised_o %>% drop_na()
free_data_all_incline_revised_y <- free_data_all_incline_revised_y %>% drop_na()

figure_o<- ggplot(free_data_all_incline_revised_o, aes(x= factor(Incline), y=Response.Response, fill= factor(Incline))) + 
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE) + scale_fill_manual(values=c("pink",
                             "lightblue", "#CBC3E3"))+
  labs(title="Inclined in Free Study for Older Adults") + geom_jitter(shape=16, position=position_jitter(0.2))+
  labs(x = "Inclination", y = "Number of times 'free' was recalled", 
       title= "Recalling 'free' in Free Condition for Older Adults", fill = "Incline") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(3), linetype = "dashed", color = c("black"))+ylim(0,20)+
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'))

figure_o

figure_y<- ggplot(free_data_all_incline_revised_y, aes(x= factor(Incline), y=Response.Response, fill= factor(Incline))) + 
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE) + scale_fill_manual(values=c("pink",
                             "lightblue", "#CBC3E3"))+
  labs(title="Inclined in Free Study for Young Adults") + geom_jitter(shape=16, position=position_jitter(0.2))+
  labs(x = "Inclination", y = "Number of times 'free' was recalled", 
       title= "Recalling 'free' in Free Condition for Young Adults", fill = "Incline") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(3), linetype = "dashed", color = c("black"))+ylim(0,20)+
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'))

figure_y

```

```{r}
nofree_data_all_incline_revised <- subset(average_figure_all_incline, average_figure_all_incline$Study!= "Free")

nofree_data_all_incline_revised <- na.omit(nofree_data_all_incline_revised)

write.csv(nofree_data_all_incline_revised, "nofree_data_all_incline_revised.csv")

average_nofree_all_incline_revised_free <- nofree_data_all_incline_revised %>% 
  group_by(Incline, Age) %>% summarise_at(vars(Response.Response), list(Response.Response = mean))

stand_incline_nofree <- data.frame(
  Incline=c("Not Inclined", "Unsure", "Inclined", "Not Inclined", "Unsure", "Inclined"),
  Age = c("Young", "Young", "Young", "Older", "Older", "Older"),
  sd=c(.486, .25, .592, .426, 1.01, .33) 

)
average_nofree_all_incline_revised_free$Incline<-as.character(average_nofree_all_incline_revised_free$Incline)
average_nofree_all_incline_revised_free[average_nofree_all_incline_revised_free == "0" ] <- "Not Inclined"
average_nofree_all_incline_revised_free[average_nofree_all_incline_revised_free == "1" ] <- "Unsure"
average_nofree_all_incline_revised_free[average_nofree_all_incline_revised_free == "2" ] <- "Inclined"
#average_nofree_all_incline_revised_free[average_nofree_all_incline_revised_free == "3" ] <- "Very Inclined"

write.csv(average_nofree_all_incline_revised_free, "average_nofree_all_incline_revised_free.csv")

average_nofree_all_incline_revised_free <- read.csv("/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLAstuff/Free Study/average_nofree_all_incline_revised_free.csv")

average_figure_all_incline_nofree<- merge(average_nofree_all_incline_revised_free, stand_incline_nofree, by=c("Incline","Age"))

average_figure_all_incline_nofree$Age <- factor(average_figure_all_incline_nofree$Age, levels = c("Young", "Older"))

average_figure_all_incline_nofree$Incline <- factor(average_figure_all_incline_nofree$Incline, levels = c("Not Inclined", "Unsure", "Inclined"))

ggplot(data=average_figure_all_incline_nofree, aes(x=Age, y=Response.Response, fill=Incline)) +
geom_bar(stat="identity", color= "black", position=position_dodge())+
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = FALSE)) +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Number of times 'free' was recalled", 
       title= "Recalling 'free' in No Free Condition") +
scale_fill_manual(values=c("pink",
                             "lightblue", "#CBC3E3"))+
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Response.Response-sd, ymax=Response.Response+sd), width=0.2, colour="black", position=position_dodge(.9)) +
  ylim(0,6)+
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(0), linetype = "dashed", color = c("black"))
nofree_data_all_incline_revised$Incline<-as.character(nofree_data_all_incline_revised$Incline)
nofree_data_all_incline_revised$Incline[nofree_data_all_incline_revised$Incline == "0" ] <- "Not Inclined"
nofree_data_all_incline_revised$Incline[nofree_data_all_incline_revised$Incline == "1" ] <- "Unsure"
nofree_data_all_incline_revised$Incline[nofree_data_all_incline_revised$Incline == "2" ] <- "Inclined"

nofree_data_all_incline_revised_o <- subset(nofree_data_all_incline_revised, nofree_data_all_incline_revised$Age!= "Young") %>% drop_na()

nofree_data_all_incline_revised_y <- subset(nofree_data_all_incline_revised, nofree_data_all_incline_revised$Age!= "Older") %>% drop_na()


nofree_data_all_incline_revised_o$Incline <- factor(nofree_data_all_incline_revised_o$Incline, levels = c("Not Inclined", "Unsure", "Inclined"))

nofree_data_all_incline_revised_y$Incline <- factor(nofree_data_all_incline_revised_y$Incline, levels = c("Not Inclined", "Unsure", "Inclined"))

nofree_data_all_incline_revised_o <- nofree_data_all_incline_revised_o %>% drop_na()
nofree_data_all_incline_revised_y <- nofree_data_all_incline_revised_y %>% drop_na()


figure_o_nofree<- ggplot(nofree_data_all_incline_revised_o, aes(x= factor(Incline), y=Response.Response, fill= factor(Incline))) + 
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE) + scale_fill_manual(values=c("pink",
                             "lightblue", "#CBC3E3"))+
  labs(title="Inclined in No Free Study for Older Adults") + geom_jitter(shape=16, position=position_jitter(0.2))+
  labs(x = "Inclination", y = "Number of times 'free' was recalled", 
       title= "Recalling 'free' in No Free Condition for Older Adults", fill = "Incline") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(0), linetype = "dashed", color = c("black"))+ylim(0,20)+
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'))

figure_o_nofree

figure_y_nofree<- ggplot(nofree_data_all_incline_revised_y, aes(x= factor(Incline), y=Response.Response, fill= factor(Incline))) + 
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE) + scale_fill_manual(values=c("pink",
                             "lightblue", "#CBC3E3"))+
  labs(title="Inclined in No Free Study for Young Adults") + geom_jitter(shape=16, position=position_jitter(0.2))+
  labs(x = "Inclination", y = "Number of times 'free' was recalled", 
       title= "Recalling 'free' in No Free Condition for Young Adults", fill = "Incline") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(0), linetype = "dashed", color = c("black"))+ylim(0,20)+
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'))

figure_y_nofree
```

```{r}

figure_free_i <- read.csv("/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLAstuff/Free Study/free_data_all_incline_revised_rev.csv")

figure_nofree_i <- read.csv("/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLAstuff/Free Study/nofree_data_all_incline_revised_rev.csv")

figure_free_all_i <- rbind(figure_free_i, figure_nofree_i)

write.csv(figure_free_all_i, "figure_free_all_i_jam.csv")

#chi square




figure_incline_all <- figure_free_all_i %>% 
  select(Order.File, Incline, Age) %>% as.data.frame() 

figure_incline_all[figure_incline_all == "0" ] <- "Not inclined"
figure_incline_all[figure_incline_all == "1"] <- "Unsure"
figure_incline_all[figure_incline_all == "2"] <- "Inclined"


#figure_incline <- transform(figure_incline, Response.Response = as.numeric(Response.Response))
#as.numeric(figure_free$Response.Response)

figure_incline_all<- mutate(figure_incline_all, 
                    Sum = ifelse(str_detect(figure_incline_all$Incline, "inc"), "1","1"))

#sum_incline <- figure_incline %>% 
#  group_by(Order.File, Response.Response) %>% summarize(count_Sum=count(Sum))

figure_incline_all <- transform(figure_incline_all, Sum = as.numeric(Sum))

figure_incline_all<- figure_incline_all %>% 
  group_by(Order.File, Incline,Age) %>% summarise_at(vars(Sum), list(Sum = sum))



colnames(figure_incline_all)[colnames(figure_incline_all) == 'Order.File'] <- 'Study'
#colnames(figure_incline_all)[colnames(figure_incline_all) == 'Incline'] <- 'Type'
figure_incline_all[figure_incline_all == "procedure_free.csv" ] <- "Free"
figure_incline_all[figure_incline_all == "procedure.csv"] <- "No Free"



#figure_incline_sum_all<- merge(figure_incline_all, stand_incline_all, by=c("Type","Study"))

inclined_no_free <- subset(figure_incline_all, figure_incline_all$Study!= "Free")

inclined_no_free$Age <- factor(inclined_no_free$Age, levels = c("Young", "Older"))

inclined_no_free$Incline <- factor(inclined_no_free$Incline, levels = c("Not inclined", "Unsure", "Inclined"))

ggplot(inclined_no_free, aes(fill=Incline, y=Sum, x=Age)) + 
    geom_bar(position="stack", stat="identity", color= "black")+
  labs(x = "Age", y = "# of participants who were inclined", 
       title= "No Free Condition")+scale_fill_manual(values=c("pink",
                             "lightblue", "#CBC3E3"))+ theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'))
```

```{r}
inclined_no_free <- subset(figure_incline_all, figure_incline_all$Study!= "No Free")

inclined_no_free$Age <- factor(inclined_no_free$Age, levels = c("Young", "Older"))

inclined_no_free$Incline <- factor(inclined_no_free$Incline, levels = c("Not inclined", "Unsure", "Inclined"))

ggplot(inclined_no_free, aes(fill=Incline, y=Sum, x=Age)) + 
    geom_bar(position="stack", stat="identity", color= "black")+
  labs(x = "Age", y = "# of participants who were inclined", 
       title= "Free Condition")+scale_fill_manual(values=c("pink",
                             "lightblue", "#CBC3E3"))+ theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'))
```


```{r}
#graph for info
stand_info_long <- data.frame(
  Type=c("Name", "Name", "DOB", "DOB", "mail_address", "mail_address", "cc_info", "cc_info"),
  Study = c("Free", "No Free", "Free", "No Free", "Free", "No Free", "Free", "No Free"),
  sd=c(.0809,.0710, .0683, .0723, .068, .0588, .0798,.05588) 
)

#free_data_info_long <- na.omit(free_data_info_long)

free_data_all_info_revised_young <- subset(free_data_all_info_revised, free_data_all_info_revised$agegroup!= "Older")

free_data_all_info_revised_fig <- free_data_all_info_revised_young %>%
  select(ID, Order.File, Name, DOB, mail_address, cc_info, other)

free_data_all_info_revised_fig[free_data_all_info_revised_fig == "procedure_free.csv" ] <- "Free"
free_data_all_info_revised_fig[free_data_all_info_revised_fig == "procedure.csv"] <- "No Free"

fig_info_long <- free_data_all_info_revised_fig %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols=c('Name', 'DOB', "mail_address", "cc_info", "other"),
    names_to = "Type",
    values_to = "Score")

fig_info_long <- na.omit(fig_info_long)

fig_info_long_sum<- fig_info_long %>% 
  group_by(Type, Order.File) %>% summarise_at(vars(Score), list(Score = mean))


colnames(fig_info_long_sum)[colnames(fig_info_long_sum) == 'Order.File'] <- 'Study'

fig_info_long_sum <- subset(fig_info_long_sum, fig_info_long_sum$Type!= "other")


fig_info_long_sum<- merge(fig_info_long_sum, stand_info_long, by=c("Type","Study"))

fig_info_long_sum$Type <- factor(fig_info_long_sum$Type, levels = c("Name", "DOB", "mail_address", "cc_info", "other"))
fig_info_long_sum$Study <- factor(fig_info_long_sum$Study, levels = c("Free", "No Free"))

figure_info_long_mean <- ggplot(data=fig_info_long_sum, aes(x=Type, y=Score, fill=Study)) +
geom_bar(stat="identity", color= "black", position=position_dodge())+
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = FALSE)) +
  labs(x = "Information", y = "Proportion Correct", 
       title= "Information") +

  scale_fill_manual(values=c("pink",
                             "lightblue"))+
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Score-sd, ymax=Score+sd), width=0.2, colour="black", position=position_dodge(.9)) + ylim(0,1)

figure_info_long_mean
```


```{r}
#graph for info
stand_info_long_old <- data.frame(
  Type=c("Name", "Name", "DOB", "DOB", "mail_address", "mail_address", "cc_info", "cc_info"),
  Study = c("Free", "No Free", "Free", "No Free", "Free", "No Free", "Free", "No Free"),
  sd=c(.05,.06, .057, .037, .05, .06, .06,.06) 
)

#free_data_info_long <- na.omit(free_data_info_long)

free_data_all_info_revised_old <- subset(free_data_all_info_revised, free_data_all_info_revised$agegroup!= "Young")

free_data_all_info_revised_fig_old <- free_data_all_info_revised_old %>%
  select(ID, Order.File, Name, DOB, mail_address, cc_info, other)

free_data_all_info_revised_fig_old[free_data_all_info_revised_fig_old == "procedure_free.csv" ] <- "Free"
free_data_all_info_revised_fig_old[free_data_all_info_revised_fig_old == "procedure.csv"] <- "No Free"

fig_info_long_old <- free_data_all_info_revised_fig_old %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols=c('Name', 'DOB', "mail_address", "cc_info", "other"),
    names_to = "Type",
    values_to = "Score")

fig_info_long_old <- na.omit(fig_info_long_old)

fig_info_long_sum_old<- fig_info_long_old %>% 
  group_by(Type, Order.File) %>% summarise_at(vars(Score), list(Score = mean))


colnames(fig_info_long_sum_old)[colnames(fig_info_long_sum_old) == 'Order.File'] <- 'Study'
fig_info_long_sum_old <- subset(fig_info_long_sum_old, fig_info_long_sum_old$Type!= "other")

fig_info_long_sum_old<- merge(fig_info_long_sum_old, stand_info_long_old, by=c("Type","Study"))

fig_info_long_sum_old$Type <- factor(fig_info_long_sum_old$Type, levels = c("Name", "DOB", "mail_address", "cc_info", "other"))
fig_info_long_sum_old$Study <- factor(fig_info_long_sum_old$Study, levels = c("Free", "No Free"))




figure_info_long_sum_old <- ggplot(data=fig_info_long_sum_old, aes(x=Type, y=Score, fill=Study)) +
geom_bar(stat="identity", color= "black", position=position_dodge())+
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = FALSE)) +
  labs(x = "Information", y = "Proportiong Correct", 
       title= "Information") +

  scale_fill_manual(values=c("pink",
                             "lightblue"))+
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Score-sd, ymax=Score+sd), width=0.2, colour="black", position=position_dodge(.9)) +ylim(0,1)

figure_info_long_sum_old
```
```{r}
fig_info_long$agegroup <- 'Young'
fig_info_long_old$agegroup <- 'Older'

fig_info_long_jamovi <- rbind(fig_info_long, fig_info_long_old)

#write.csv(fig_info_long_jamovi, "fig_info_long_jamovi_other.csv")

fig_info_long_jamovi <- subset(fig_info_long_jamovi, fig_info_long_jamovi$Type!= "other")


```

```{r}

stand_time_hm <- data.frame(
  Age=c("Young", "Older", "Young", "Older"),
  Study = c("Free", "Free", "No Free", "No Free"),
  sd=c(.54,1.27, 1.16, .84) 
)


colnames(free_data_all_hm_revised)[colnames(free_data_all_hm_revised) == 'Order.File'] <- 'Study'
colnames(free_data_all_hm_revised)[colnames(free_data_all_hm_revised) == 'agegroup'] <- 'Age'
free_data_all_hm_revised[free_data_all_hm_revised == "procedure_free.csv" ] <- "Free"
free_data_all_hm_revised[free_data_all_hm_revised == "procedure.csv"] <- "No Free"

free_data_all_hm_revised$Age <- factor(free_data_all_hm_revised$Age, levels = c("Young", "Older"))

free_data_all_hm_revised <- free_data_all_hm_revised %>% 
   mutate(time = Response.RT / 1000)

free_data_all_hm_revised<- free_data_all_hm_revised %>%
  select(ID, Study, Procedure.Text, Response.RT, Response.Response, Age, time)

free_data_all_hm_revised <- na.omit(free_data_all_hm_revised)


write.csv(free_data_all_hm_revised, "free_data_all_hm_revised_time.csv")

free_data_all_hm_revised_avg<- free_data_all_hm_revised %>% 
  group_by(Study, Age) %>% summarise_at(vars(time), list(time = mean))

free_data_all_hm_revised_avg<- merge(free_data_all_hm_revised_avg, stand_time_hm, by=c("Age","Study"))

ggplot(data=free_data_all_hm_revised_avg, aes(x=Age, y=time, fill=Study)) +
geom_bar(stat="identity", color= "black", position=position_dodge())+
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = FALSE)) +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Study Time (s)", 
       title= "How long the ad was studied for") +

  scale_fill_manual(values=c("pink",
                             "lightblue"))+
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=time-sd, ymax=time+sd), width=0.2, colour="black", position=position_dodge(.9)) 


```
```{r}
#free_data_all_hm_revised
free_rt_free <- subset(free_data_all_hm_revised, free_data_all_hm_revised$Study!= "No Free")

write.csv(free_rt_free, "free_rt_free_cloud.csv")

free_rt_free$Age <- factor(free_rt_free$Age, levels = c("Young", "Older"))

free_rt_free <- subset(free_rt_free, free_rt_free$ID!= "24geg8t997")
free_rt_free <- subset(free_rt_free, free_rt_free$ID!= "h09wf1bh6c")

correlation_free <- ggplot(free_rt_free, aes(x=time, y=Response.Response, color = Age, linetype = Age)) + 
  geom_smooth(method=lm, se=FALSE)+ geom_point()+
  labs(x = "Study Time (s)", y = "Number of times 'free' was recalled") +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'), axis.line.x = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.line.y = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.ticks.x=element_blank())+
  guides(color = guide_legend(reverse = FALSE, title = "Age")) + scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,17))+
  scale_colour_grey(start = 0.6, 
                  end = 0.0, 
                  guide_legend(title = "")) +
#theme_classic() +  +
  ylim(0,17) 

correlation_free


```

```{r}
#Multiple linear regressions
#free_rt_free
free_mlr <- lm(Response.Response ~ Response.RT + Age, data = free_rt_free)

summary(free_mlr)
```

```{r}
#free_data_all_hm_revised
free_rt_nofree <- subset(free_data_all_hm_revised, free_data_all_hm_revised$Study!= "Free")
write.csv(free_rt_nofree, "free_rt_nofree_cloud.csv")

free_rt_nofree$Age <- factor(free_rt_nofree$Age, levels = c("Young", "Older"))

correlation_nofree <- ggplot(free_rt_nofree, aes(x=time, y=Response.Response, color = Age, linetype = Age)) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm, se=FALSE)+ geom_point()+
  labs(x = "Study Time (s)", y = "Number of times 'free' was recalled") + theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'), axis.line.x = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.line.y = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.ticks.x=element_blank())+
  guides(color = guide_legend(reverse = FALSE, title = "Age")) +scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,17))+
  scale_colour_grey(start = 0.6, 
                  end = 0.0, 
                  guide_legend(title = "")) +
#theme_classic() +  +
  ylim(0,17)



correlation_nofree
```
```{r}
nofree_mlr <- lm(Response.Response ~ Response.RT + Age, data = free_rt_nofree)

summary(nofree_mlr)
```



```{r}
#t-tests
free_rt_nofree_ <- subset(free_data_all_hm_revised, free_data_all_hm_revised$Study!= "Free")
t_free_rt_nofree_young <- subset(free_rt_nofree_, free_rt_nofree_$Age!= "Older")

write.csv(t_free_rt_nofree_young, "t_free_rt_nofree_young.csv")

free_rt_free_ <- subset(free_data_all_hm_revised, free_data_all_hm_revised$Study!= "No Free")
t_free_rt_free_young <- subset(free_rt_free_, free_rt_free_$Age!= "Older")

write.csv(t_free_rt_free_young, "t_free_rt_free_young.csv")

free_rt_nofree_o <- subset(free_data_all_hm_revised, free_data_all_hm_revised$Study!= "Free")
t_free_rt_nofree_o <- subset(free_rt_nofree_o, free_rt_nofree_$Age!= "Young")

write.csv(t_free_rt_nofree_o, "t_free_rt_nofree_o.csv")

free_rt_free_o <- subset(free_data_all_hm_revised, free_data_all_hm_revised$Study!= "No Free")
t_free_rt_free_o <- subset(free_rt_free_o, free_rt_free_$Age!= "Young")

write.csv(t_free_rt_free_o, "t_free_rt_free_o.csv")

#exclusion
free_data_all_hm_revised_ex <- read.csv("/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLAstuff/Free Study/free_data_all_cloud_howmany_ex.csv")

colnames(free_data_all_hm_revised_ex)[colnames(free_data_all_hm_revised_ex) == 'Order.File'] <- 'Study'
colnames(free_data_all_hm_revised_ex)[colnames(free_data_all_hm_revised_ex) == 'agegroup'] <- 'Age'
free_data_all_hm_revised_ex[free_data_all_hm_revised_ex == "procedure_free.csv" ] <- "Free"
free_data_all_hm_revised_ex[free_data_all_hm_revised_ex == "procedure.csv"] <- "No Free"

#t-tests with exclusion
free_rt_nofree_ex <- subset(free_data_all_hm_revised_ex, free_data_all_hm_revised_ex$Study!= "Free")
t_free_rt_nofree_young_ex <- subset(free_rt_nofree_ex, free_rt_nofree_ex$Age!= "Older")

write.csv(t_free_rt_nofree_young_ex, "t_free_rt_nofree_young_ex.csv")

free_rt_free_ex <- subset(free_data_all_hm_revised_ex, free_data_all_hm_revised_ex$Study!= "No Free")
t_free_rt_free_young_ex <- subset(free_rt_free_, free_rt_free_$Age!= "Older")

write.csv(t_free_rt_free_young_ex, "t_free_rt_free_young_ex.csv")

free_rt_nofree_o_ex <- subset(free_data_all_hm_revised_ex, free_data_all_hm_revised_ex$Study!= "Free")
t_free_rt_nofree_o_ex <- subset(free_rt_nofree_o_ex, free_rt_nofree_ex$Age!= "Young")

write.csv(t_free_rt_nofree_o_ex, "t_free_rt_nofree_o_ex.csv")

free_rt_free_o_ex <- subset(free_data_all_hm_revised_ex, free_data_all_hm_revised_ex$Study!= "No Free")
t_free_rt_free_o_ex <- subset(free_rt_free_o_ex, free_rt_free_ex$Age!= "Young")

write.csv(t_free_rt_free_o_ex, "t_free_rt_free_o_ex.csv")
```
